brief_justification: Wrong answer (cabin instead of main deck) but reasoning about the cabin as default location was partially sound; surface-level analysis only considering the general storage location without tracking the timeline of events; no self-monitoring or questioning of assumptions; no verification against the story's sequence of events; presented answer as certain with no acknowledgment of competing possibilities; did not consider the main deck as an alternative despite Alex moving charts there; showed some derivation from the text but failed to account for Dean's knowledge state and the sequence of movements
